name: {{ app_name }} - Application Performance
description: Application performance monitoring dashboard for {{ app_name }}

widgets.title: Response Time (95th percentile)
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT percentile(duration, 95) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Throughput (RPM)
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT count(*) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Error Rate
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Apdex Score
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT apdex(duration, t: 0.5) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Response Time Distribution
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT histogram(duration, 10, 10) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Top Slow Transactions
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(duration), count(*), name FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' FACET name LIMIT 10 ORDER BY average(duration) DESC SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Database Response Time
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(duration) FROM DatastoreSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: External Service Response Time
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(duration) FROM ExternalServiceSample WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: Browser Page Load Time
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT average(duration) FROM PageView WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' TIMESERIES AUTO

widgets.title: User Satisfaction
widgets.nrql_query: SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE duration < 1.0) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = '{{ app_name }}' SINCE 1 hour ago
